stumpGrinding.label: Stump grinding
stumpGrinding.description: Grinding an existing stump down below grade while leaving the roots in place.

stumpRemoval.label: Stump removal
stumpRemoval.description: Removing or extracting the stump from the ground, usually including the root ball.

rootRemoval.label: Root removal
rootRemoval.description: Removing exposed, invasive, or leftover tree roots without necessarily removing a stump.

treePruning.label: Tree pruning
treePruning.description: Trimming, pruning, or cutting limbs/branches on a standing tree.

unknown.label: Unknown or not listed
unknown.description: Use when the requested service is unclear or does not match any listed service type.
